summary: Government Registers feature (v89.1.0) fully tested - all 37 backend API tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. Form A, B, E, F (view-only), FRK Blending and Gunny Bags (CRUD) registers working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test entries created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Government Registers feature tested and working. Tab at 'Govt Registers' (data-testid='tab-govt-registers'). 6 sub-tabs: Form A (paddy stock), Form B (CMR delivery), Form E (own paddy), Form F (own rice sale), FRK Blending, Gunny Bags. Form A/B/E/F are view-only aggregating data from mill_entries, milling_entries, salebook, private_paddy collections. FRK and Gunny Bags have full CRUD. All Excel exports work.
